channel.title: PubMed: SGLT2 inhibitors heart failure - Search Results
channel.description: PubMed search results for: SGLT2 inhibitors heart failure

item.title: Dapagliflozin and Prevention of Heart Failure Hospitalization.
item.description: This meta-analysis of 8 randomized controlled trials demonstrates that SGLT2 inhibitors reduce heart failure hospitalization by 31% across the spectrum of ejection fraction.
item.dc:creator: McMurray JJV, Packer M

item.title: Empagliflozin in Advanced Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction.
item.description: Among patients with advanced HFrEF (LVEF <25%), empagliflozin improved composite outcomes including cardiovascular death and worsening heart failure events.
